# Summa contra Gentiles

*[Thomas Aquinas](../philosophers/aquinas.md) · 1264 · *Summa contra Gentiles**

An apologetic treatise by Aquinas meant to defend the Christian faith before those who do not accept Scripture, relying on the resources of reason alone for what can be demonstrated and showing that the revealed truths are not contrary to it.
